data.body: 9fd5 TDD RED: authored 13 behavioral tests (4 happy in tests/unit/test_attest_dsse.py + 9 held-out edge/contract/error). Confirmed all RED for right reason (NotImplementedError from API stub; removed 1 tautological non-base64 test that caught NotImplementedError via broad Exception). Held out test_attest_dsse_heldout.py to /Users/joeoakhart/.claude/jobs/ea905fb6/tmp/heldout. Dispatching implementer with happy-path + stub only.
